conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "apologize" in the email.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. Avoid using the keyword "apologize" in the email.
response:
Subject: Request for Extension: [Project Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension on the [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. Due to an unexpected personal matter that has arisen, I am unable to finalize the work to the standard you expect by the original deadline.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this delay may cause to your grading schedule. I am confident that I can submit a high-quality project by [New Date/Time], and I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to complete this assignment under those circumstances.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]
